basic_details.job_title: OAV Gopinathpur Teachers Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Odisha Adarsha Vidyalaya Gopinathpur has released the official Contractual Teachers Notification 2026 on 18 May 2026 at the official website of Angul district. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced under the OAV Gopinathpur Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged up to 65 years with qualifications such as Bachelor Degree in Fine Arts/Visual Arts, Bachelor Degree in Music, or B.P.Ed/M.P.Ed can apply offline up to 08-06-2026. The official notification PDF and application details are available below.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 65 years for all posts.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor Degree in Fine arts/ Visual arts, Bachelor Degree in music, Degree/Post Graduate Degree in Physical Education (B.P.Ed /M.P. Ed.)
qualification.details: Art Teacher: Bachelor Degree in Fine arts/ Visual arts from a recognized university. Music Teacher: Bachelor Degree in music from a recognized university or its equivalent from a recognized university. PET: Degree/Post Graduate Degree in Physical Education i.e. B.P.Ed /M.P. Ed. (A course prescribed by NCTE) from a recognized University/ Institution.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://angul.odisha.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 08-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the OAV Gopinathpur Contractual Teachers recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the OAV Gopinathpur Contractual Teachers recruitment is 08 June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Contractual Teachers at OAV Gopinathpur?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies for Contractual Teachers posts at Odisha Adarsha Vidyalaya Gopinathpur.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Contractual Teachers posts?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Contractual Teachers posts will receive a salary of Rs. 20,000 per month.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for applying to these posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all Contractual Teachers posts is 65 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for the OAV Gopinathpur recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for this recruitment will involve an Interview and Document Verification.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the OAV Gopinathpur recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What are the required qualifications for the Art Teacher post?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have a Bachelor Degree in Fine arts/ Visual arts from a recognized university to apply for the Art Teacher position.

faq.question: Q8. What qualifications are required for the Music Teacher post?
faq.answer: A Bachelor Degree in music from a recognized university or its equivalent is required for the Music Teacher post.

faq.question: Q9. What is the eligibility for the PET post?
faq.answer: For the PET post, candidates must possess a Degree/Post Graduate Degree in Physical Education (B.P.Ed /M.P. Ed.) from a recognized University/Institution.

faq.question: Q10. How should candidates submit their applications?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted offline by sending the completed form along with required documents to the address specified in the official notification before the last date.
